title: MMKV-backed Reanimated shared values

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS and Android keep the same behavior; platform-specific shadow/elevation or picker APIs are isolated at the edge.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Layout uses available width, safe-area padding, and minimum 44px targets so phone and tablet density stay usable.

animation_strategy: Motion is bounded, cancellable, and tied to state changes the user can understand.
gesture_strategy: Primary action is exposed through a Pressable with an accessibility action, with gestures treated as acceleration only.
accessibility_considerations: Expose role, state, and labels for the semantic action; add non-gesture alternatives for keyboard/switch users.
performance_notes: Hot-path work is kept outside render loops; state updates happen only on committed user-visible changes.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

title: Avoid measure() on every render

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.

gesture_strategy: Primary action is exposed through a Pressable with an accessibility action, with gestures treated as acceleration only.
solution: // usePersistedLayout.ts\nimport {useState, useCallback} from 'react';\nexport function useCapturedLayout() { const [layout, setLayout] = useState({x:0, y:0, width:0, height:0}); const onLayout = useCallback((e: any) => setLayout(e.nativeEvent.layout), []); return {layout, onLayout}; }
interaction_details: onLayout fires only when size changes
accessibility_considerations: Expose role, state, and labels for the semantic action; add non-gesture alternatives for keyboard/switch users.
performance_notes: Hot-path work is kept outside render loops; state updates happen only on committed user-visible changes.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

animation_strategy: Motion is bounded, cancellable, and tied to state changes the user can understand.

accessibility_considerations: Every primary operation has a visible label, 44px target, and non-gesture path.
performance_notes: Many small circles — keep gap > 8.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

title: Avoid unnecessary StyleSheet objects
design_brief: Use StyleSheet.create once per file. Don't recreate inline.
mobile_reasoning: StyleSheet.create only at module scope.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS and Android keep the same behavior; platform-specific shadow/elevation or picker APIs are isolated at the edge.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Layout uses available width, safe-area padding, and minimum 44px targets so phone and tablet density stay usable.

animation_strategy: Motion is bounded, cancellable, and tied to state changes the user can understand.
gesture_strategy: Primary action is exposed through a Pressable with an accessibility action, with gestures treated as acceleration only.
accessibility_considerations: Expose role, state, and labels for the semantic action; add non-gesture alternatives for keyboard/switch users.
performance_notes: Hot-path work is kept outside render loops; state updates happen only on committed user-visible changes.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

title: Conditional field reveal based on toggle
design_brief: Toggle reveals additional fields with animation (e.g., 'Custom amount' toggle reveals input).
mobile_reasoning: Conditional render + Reanimated layout exit/entry.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS and Android keep the same behavior; platform-specific shadow/elevation or picker APIs are isolated at the edge.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Layout uses available width, safe-area padding, and minimum 44px targets so phone and tablet density stay usable.

animation_strategy: FadeIn/FadeOut + layout.
gesture_strategy: Tap targets are at least 44px and form submission is explicit; no hidden gesture is required.
accessibility_considerations: Each input has a label, error hint, visible validation copy, and disabled submit state.
performance_notes: Hot-path work is kept outside render loops; state updates happen only on committed user-visible changes.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.
